name: Jennie Grossinger's Knishes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
2. Make a well in the center and add the eggs, oil, and water.
3. Work the ingredients together with your hands until smooth.
4. Divide the dough into two portions and roll them as thin as possible.
5. Brush each portion with oil.
6. Spread the filling on one side of the dough and roll it up like a jelly roll.
7. Cut into 1 1/2 inch slices.
Potato Knishes:
8. Brown the onions in fat or butter.
9. Beat the potatoes, egg, salt, and pepper until fluffy.
Cheese Knishes:
10. Use scallions instead of onions for better flavor.
11. Brown the scallions in butter.
12. Beat the cheese, egg, salt, pepper, and sour cream until smooth.
Meat Knishes:
13. Lightly brown the onions in fat.
14. Add the meat, rice, egg, salt, and pepper, mixing until smooth.
Chicken Knishes:
15. Mix all ingredients until smooth.
Potato-Do
